title: The Raid into Fars
description: According to al-Sari-Shu'ayb-Sayf-Muhammad, al-Muhallab and 'Amr: In al-Ba $rah and its environs, comprising in those days the adjacent Sawid and al-Ahwiz, the Muslims had been living in circumstances prevailing until that day:451 what they had conquered was fully under their control, and the region with which they had concluded a peace treaty was under the control of its inhabitants, who duly paid the khardj, with the understanding that they would not be invaded, enjoying…

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 13
